results.rendered_html:
ḍīna p. p. [ḍī-kta] Flown up.
— naṃ The flight of a bird. The varieties of the flight of birds are said to be 101, the word prefixed to ḍīna showing the particular mode of flight; e. g. avaḍīnaṃ, uḍḍīnaṃ, praḍīnaṃ, abhiḍīnaṃ, viḍīnaṃ, pariḍīnaṃ, parāḍīnaṃ &c.
